items.title: Apple Just Hit a $4 Trillion Milestone: Do Experts Think It’s Time To Buy?
items.description: Apple just recently crossed a $4 trillion market cap, but growth lags rivals. Is Apple stock a buy now, or should investors wait? Here’s what experts say.

items.title: Former Fed governor's stock trades violated the central bank's ethics rules
items.description: A former Federal Reserve governor who retired in August listed several stock trades in her financial disclosure documents for 2024 that violated the central bank's ethics rules.  The transactions are outlined in a report released Saturday by the U.S. Office of Government Ethics, which reviewed Adriana Kugler's financial disclosures after the Fed referred them to its inspector general earlier this year.  Kugler, who unexpectedly stepped down from the Fed board Aug. 8, disclosed more than a dozen individual stock trades, including several made during financial trading “blackout periods” around the time the Federal Reserve's policymaking committee meets to set interest rates and other monetary policy.

items.title: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire snaps up major tech stock, trims favorite
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway’s (BRK.A, BRK.B) latest 13F filing delivered just the kind of signal for which Warren Buffett is famous. Following years of leaning on Apple (AAPL) as the crown jewel of its stock portfolio, the firm has just trimmed its stake again, continuing a trend that has quietly reshaped ...

items.title: Jury says Apple owes Masimo $634M for patent infringement
items.description: A federal jury in California ruled Friday that Apple must pay medical device maker Masimo $634 million for infringing a patent on blood oxygen monitoring technology.

items.title: Apple is ramping up succession plans for CEO Tim Cook and may tap this hardware exec to take over, report says
items.description: John Ternus, Apple's senior VP of hardware engineering, could take control of the company as soon as next year, sources told the Financial Times.
